notes: Run 2026-07-03. Mechanics: Hidden Words (5) + Before & After (5). Last pack (2026-06-28) used Anagram + Homophone; (2026-06-27) Crossword + Rhyme Time; (2026-06-26) Initials + Before & After; (2026-06-24) Hidden Word + Homophone. Choosing Hidden Words + Before & After as this pair hasn't run recently together. Hidden answers (ALE, ICE, EWE, ASH, NET) and Before & After pivots (Truck, Horse, Candy, Town, Boat) are all fresh — none appear in the active bank or prior drafts. Each sentence evokes the answer's meaning naturally around the carrier word or pivot.
